plugins.name: Git Tools
plugins.description: Git operations as Colony tools: status, diff, log, branch, commit, blame, stash. Honors caste-based RBAC so untrusted runs cannot rewrite history.
plugins.author: colony-team

plugins.name: GitHub
plugins.description: GitHub API integration: list/create issues, open PRs, post review comments, fetch repo metadata. Uses fine-grained PATs with least-privilege scopes.
plugins.author: colony-team

plugins.name: Slack
plugins.description: Send messages, read channel history, react to threads. Useful for posting swarm run results or pulling support context.
plugins.author: colony-team

plugins.name: Browser Automation
plugins.description: Wraps the bundled BrowserSidecarRuntime as discoverable tools — navigate, click, type, wait, screenshot. Requires the browser sidecar to be running.
plugins.author: colony-team

plugins.name: Jira / Linear
plugins.description: Read and update issues across Jira, Linear, and Asana. Standardizes ticket fields so swarm tasks can drive any tracker.
plugins.author: colony-team

plugins.name: HTTP Client
plugins.description: Make HTTP requests against allowlisted domains. Domains must be explicitly approved per-session; default-deny applies.
plugins.author: colony-team

plugins.name: PostgreSQL
plugins.description: Read-only by default Postgres tools — describe schema, run SELECT, EXPLAIN. Write tools are gated behind sessions.write + an explicit policy rule.
plugins.author: colony-team

plugins.name: Filesystem Plus
plugins.description: Advanced filesystem ops beyond built-ins: recursive search, rename-with-refactor, batch-edit. All operations validated against PathValidator.
plugins.author: colony-team

plugins.name: Web Search
plugins.description: Search the web using configurable providers (Brave, DuckDuckGo, Tavily). API keys are stored in the session-scoped vault.
plugins.author: colony-team

plugins.name: Ollama Bridge
plugins.description: Helper tools for managing local Ollama models — list, pull, delete, switch. Useful for caste configurations that mix local and cloud models.
plugins.author: colony-team
